name: German Daily
tagline: Ten German words a day with examples — your votes shape tomorrow
description: Single-user web app: each calendar day (Europe/Berlin) shows 10 vocabulary items with English gloss and bilingual example sentences. Play pronunciation for the German headword or the example sentence (OpenAI TTS when API key is set; otherwise browser speech where available). Thumb up or down to steer topic mix for the next batch. Uses OpenAI when configured; otherwise a built-in word pool.

env_vars.description: Optional. When set, daily batches use gpt-4o-mini and word/example audio uses OpenAI TTS; otherwise a static pool and browser speech (where available).
